patch.value: Reported extension version drifts from released version (hardcoded VERSION constant)

Found during 2026-06-12 fleet verification vs CLI 2026.6.12 (companion task pm-cli-website-z50w): published pm-ts-starter 2026.6.10 reports version 2026.6.4 in 'pm ts-starter info' and extension metadata. Cause: const VERSION = "2026.6.4" hardcoded in index.ts — the Daily Release workflow auto-bumps package.json/manifest.json and only rewrites 'version: "..."' literals (single match), so a bare constant silently drifts. Fix: resolve VERSION from manifest.json at module load (dist/../manifest.json), with 0.0.0 fallback; test now asserts against manifest.json instead of a snapshot literal.
pm ts-starter info reports the same version as manifest.json/package.json in every future release without manual edits

value.note: VERSION resolved from manifest.json at load

patch.value: Fixed: VERSION read from manifest.json; functionally verified via pm extension --install in throwaway workspace (info now reports 2026.6.9 = manifest); tests 2/2 pass
